log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!

→ Rock: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 18] HIT! 35 damage. Tortle — Winged Striker HP: 32/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
